# Green Mood CBD - LLM Discovery File

site: https://greenmood.fr
name: Green Mood CBD
purpose: Ecommerce platform for premium CBD products with AI BudTender recommendations.

catalog:
- CBD oils
- CBD flowers
- CBD resins
- CBD infusions

knowledge_areas:
- CBD dosage
- CBD and sleep
- CBD and anxiety
- CBD legality in France
- lab-tested product quality

assistant:
- name: AI BudTender
- role: product recommendation and education assistant

primary_pages:
- /catalogue
- /guides/guide-huile-cbd
- /guides/guide-dosage-cbd
- /guides/guide-cbd-sommeil
- /guides/guide-cbd-anxiete
- /guides/guide-legalite-cbd-france
